title: ADR Index
description: Index of all architecture decision records in the project. Provides a summary view of all decisions. The top-level 'version' field is a repository-specific schema metadata extension consumed by the validation scripts.

schema_version.description: Version of the ADR index schema this file was written against.

version.description: SemVer version of this index file.

last_updated.description: Date of last update in YYYY-MM-DD format.

decisions.description: Summary of all ADRs. Must match the individual ADR files.

id.description: ADR identifier matching the individual file.

file.description: Filename of the individual ADR file (e.g., '0001-use-typescript.yaml').
